lore: A northern road-stop tucked below the snowline and watched by old border pines.
name: Eno

lore: A wind-bitten settlement where winter traders weigh every rumor twice.
name: Lasty

lore: A cliffside town built where the cold road breaks against black rock.
name: Rock-Point

lore: A quiet wood-town known for hard bargains and older oaths.
name: Oak

lore: A mineral market at the desert's edge, bright with white dust and sharp tongues.
name: Salt

lore: A small roadside haven where lanterns stay lit through bad weather.
name: Cottage

lore: A river-valley town with soft fields, hard boots, and guarded bridges.
name: Valley

lore: A coastal hamlet pressed between surf, reeds, and the eastern road.
name: Scrant

lore: A river crossing where ferrymen trade news before coin.
name: Hent

lore: A dryland town of kiln smoke, cracked wells, and stubborn survivors.
name: Heat

lore: A shore town where fisherfolk read storms better than maps.
name: Beach

lore: A fortified watchpost rising over the eastern delta roads.
name: Tower

lore: A riverside town where western caravans regroup before the central plains.
name: Drasig

lore: A green village with bright banners, old songs, and guarded smiles.
name: Love

lore: A plains town built around stables, couriers, and road-worn mercenaries.
name: HorseTown

lore: A pale-wood settlement where carts creak through misty groves.
name: BirchWood

lore: A market town whose square never seems to close.
name: Trade

lore: A mountain-foot town that keeps careful ledgers and brighter lamps.
name: Lorrback

lore: A stony village where masons patch roads as often as houses.
name: Stine

lore: A crossroads town laid around an old ritual circle no one admits to using.
name: Circle

lore: A proud central town whose walls carry too many repaired scars.
name: Greatling

lore: A deepwood trade post where timber, medicine, and secrets change hands.
name: GrandWood

lore: A forge-town that rings all day and glows all night.
name: Smithy

lore: A lakeside town living in the shadow of broken royal stone.
name: Crown

lore: A southern village beside old palace ruins, safe enough to begin a desperate run.
name: Glory

lore: A raised holdfast watching the roads north of Glory.
name: Hill

lore: A camp of forgefires and signal flames on the mountain road.
name: Fire

lore: A southern coast town where jungle paths end at salt gates.
name: Sea

lore: A quiet keep where abandoned wells answer with unfamiliar voices.
name: Empty

lore: Mist curls around broken causeways and sleep has sharp little teeth.
name: Dream

lore: The eastern waste scours armor clean and leaves maps full of lies.
name: Sand
